buildCommand: if [ -d flutter ]; then (cd flutter && git pull --ff-only); else git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git -b stable --depth 1; fi && ./flutter/bin/flutter config --enable-web --no-analytics && ./flutter/bin/flutter pub get && ./flutter/bin/flutter build web --release --dart-define=TRANSLATE_PROXY_URL=/api/translate --dart-define=TRANSLATION_PROVIDER=claude --dart-define=VOICE_ENGINE=device
